case_1: Vasopressor administration in septic shock is a cornerstone of hemodynamic management. The first-line agent is norepinephrin. Clinicians should be aware of potential adverse effects.
case_2: Tekst je već prirodan; minimalne izmjene nisu potrebne. Nizak AI score. Norepinephrin ostaje lijek prvog izbora u septičnom šoku prema Surviving Sepsis Guidelines 2021. Ciljana vrijednost MAP ≥65 mmHg postiže se titriranjem doze između 0.01–3.3 mcg/kg/min. Nismo opservirali statistički značajnu razliku u 28-dnevnom mortalitetu između skupina (p=0.34).
case_3: Identificirane AI formulacije i predložene zamjene: (1) "Certainly" — ukloniti; (2) "it is evident that" — ukloniti; (3) "groundbreaking" — zamijeniti s "notable"; (4) "delves into" (AI formulacija) — zamijeniti s "examines"; (5) "underscore the necessity" — zamijeniti s "highlight the need"; (6) "It should be noted that" — ukloniti; (7) "navigate these challenges" — zamijeniti s "address these issues"; (8) "paves the way for future investigations" — zamijeniti s "supports further research". Revidirani tekst: The study examines perioperative fluid management. The findings highlight the need for a nuanced approach. The authors address these issues with rigor. This research supports further investigation.
